levels.title: Foundation
levels.subtitle: Start from zero
levels.description: Small French blocks for pronunciation, recognition, and imitation.

levels.title: Intensive
levels.subtitle: A2 bridge
levels.description: Systematic A1-to-A2 bridge lessons: past, pronouns, connectors, problems, opinions, and short output.

levels.title: A2 Med
levels.subtitle: Middle A2
levels.description: Mid-A2 lessons for smoother pronouns, connected speech, polite requests, practical stories, and structured output.

levels.title: A2 Hi
levels.subtitle: High A2 to B1 bridge
levels.description: High-A2 lessons for stronger narration, nuanced opinions, hypothetical sentences, practical writing, structured speaking, and B1 readiness.

levels.title: Growth
levels.subtitle: Speak with more range
levels.description: Longer conversations, stories, opinions, and natural rhythm.
